description: Identify and remove elevation blunders from the topographic survey 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\raw_survey_with_errors.csv'. Generate an accurate triangulation (MDT) from the survey data, ensuring erroneous points causing terrain deformations are excluded. Save the corrected project to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\cleaned_survey.top' and export the cleaned list of points to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\cleaned_points.csv'.
